title: Computation of Miura surfaces with gradient Dirichlet boundary   conditions
summary:
Miura surfaces are the solutions of a constrained nonlinear elliptic system
of equations. This system is derived by homogenization from the Miura fold,
which is a type of origami fold with multiple applications in engineering. A
previous inquiry, gave suboptimal conditions for existence of solutions and
proposed an $H^2$-conformal finite element method to approximate them. In this
paper, the existence of Miura surfaces is studied using a gradient formulation.
It is also proved that, under some hypotheses, the constraints propagate from
the boundary to the interior of the domain. Then, a numerical method based on a
stabilized least-square formulation, conforming finite elements and a Newton
method is introduced to approximate Miura surfaces. The numerical method is
proved to converge and numerical tests are performed to demonstrate its
robustness.

AI.tldr: 建立了Miura曲面的梯度变分公式，证明了约束传播性质，并提出了收敛的稳定最小二乘有限元数值方法
AI.motivation: Miura曲面源于Miura折叠（一种工程应用广泛的原型折叠）的均匀化推导，是一个受约束的非线性椭圆系统。先前研究给出了次优的存在性条件，并提出了H²-共形有限元方法。本文旨在改进存在性理论并发展更有效的数值方法。
AI.techniques: 梯度变分公式、约束传播分析、稳定最小二乘格式、共形有限元方法、牛顿迭代法、收敛性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 基于梯度公式的Miura曲面存在性定理；2. 边界约束向内部传播的条件和证明；3. 稳定最小二乘有限元方法的收敛性定理
AI.significance: 为Miura曲面提供了更优的理论框架和数值方法，改进了先前次优的存在性条件，证明了约束传播性质，发展了收敛的数值算法，对工程中的折叠结构设计和分析有重要应用价值

title: The trace fractional Laplacian and the mid-range fractional Laplacian
summary:
In this paper we introduce two new fractional versions of the Laplacian. The
first one is based on the classical formula that writes the usual Laplacian as
the sum of the eigenvalues of the Hessian. The second one comes from looking at
the classical fractional Laplacian as the mean value (in the sphere) of the
1-dimensional fractional Laplacians in lines with directions in the sphere. To
obtain this second new fractional operator we just replace the mean value by
the mid-range of 1-dimensional fractional Laplacians with directions in the
sphere. For these two new fractional operators we prove a comparison principle
for viscosity sub and supersolutions and then we obtain existence and
uniqueness for the Dirichlet problem. We also show that solutions are
$C^\gamma$ smooth up to the boundary when the exterior datum is also H\"older
continuous. Finally, we prove that for the first operator we recover the
classical Laplacian in the limit as $s\nearrow 1$.

AI.tldr: 提出了两种新的分数阶拉普拉斯算子变体，并建立了相关的比较原理、存在唯一性、正则性理论及经典极限
AI.motivation: 从两种不同视角推广经典拉普拉斯算子：一是基于特征值和的经典公式，二是将经典分数阶拉普拉斯视为球面上方向平均的推广
AI.techniques: 粘性解方法、比较原理、极值原理、调和分析、极限分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 两种新算子的比较原理；2) Dirichlet问题的存在唯一性；3) 边界正则性(C^γ)；4) 第一种算子当s→1时收敛到经典拉普拉斯
AI.significance: 丰富了分数阶拉普拉斯算子理论，提供了新的非局部算子框架，为研究非局部偏微分方程提供了新工具

title: Lipolysis on Lipid Droplets: Mathematical Modelling and Numerical   Discretisations
summary:
Lipolysis is a life-essential metabolic process, which supplies fatty acids
stored in lipid droplets to the body in order to match the demands of building
new cells and providing cellular energy.
  In this paper, we present a first mathematical modelling approach for
lipolysis, which takes into account that the involved enzymes act on the
surface of lipid droplets. We postulate an active region near the surface where
the substrates are within reach of the surface-bound enzymes and formulate a
system of reaction-diffusion PDEs, which connect the active region to the inner
core of lipid droplets via interface conditions.
  We establish two numerical discretisations based on finite element method and
isogeometric analysis, and validate them to perform reliably. Since numerical
tests are best performed on non-zero explicit stationary state solutions, we
introduce and analyse a model, which describes besides lipolysis also a reverse
process (yet in a physiologically much oversimplified way). The system is not
coercive such that establishing well-posedness is a non-standard task. We prove
the unique existence of global and equilibrium solutions. We establish
exponential convergence to the equilibrium solutions using the entropy method.
We then study the stationary state model and compute explicitly for radially
symmetric solutions. Concerning the finite element methods, we show numerically
the linear and quadratic convergence of the errors with respect to the $H^{1}$-
and $L^{2}$-norms, respectively.
  Finally, we present numerical simulations of a prototypical PDE model of
lipolysis and illustrate that ATGL clustering on lipid droplets can
significantly slow down lipolysis.

AI.tldr: 建立了首个考虑酶在脂滴表面作用的脂解反应-扩散PDE模型，并证明了全局解的存在唯一性及指数收敛性。
AI.motivation: 脂解是生命必需的代谢过程，将脂滴中储存的脂肪酸供给身体以满足细胞构建和能量需求。现有模型缺乏对酶在脂滴表面作用机制的数学描述。
AI.techniques: 反应-扩散PDE系统、界面条件、有限元方法、等几何分析、熵方法、非强制性系统的适定性分析、径向对称解显式计算。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 全局解和平衡解的存在唯一性；2) 解指数收敛到平衡解；3) 径向对称稳态解的显式计算；4) 有限元方法的H¹和L²范数误差收敛性分析。
AI.significance: 首次建立了考虑酶表面作用的脂解数学模型，为理解脂解动力学提供了定量框架，揭示了ATGL聚集对脂解速率的调控机制，具有重要的生理学意义。

title: On the optimal rate of vortex stretching for axisymmetric Euler flows   without swirl
comment:
24 pages, 2 figures, this version to appear in Arch. Rational Mech.
  Anal
summary:
For axisymmetric flows without swirl and compactly supported initial
vorticity, we prove the upper bound of $t^{4/3}$ for the growth of the
vorticity maximum, which was conjectured by Childress [Phys. D, 2008] and
supported by numerical computations from Childress--Gilbert--Valiant [J. Fluid
Mech. 2016]. The key is to estimate the velocity maximum by the kinetic energy
together with conserved quantities involving the vorticity.

AI.tldr: 证明了无旋轴对称流动中涡度最大值的增长上界为t^{4/3}，验证了Childress的猜想
AI.motivation: 研究轴对称无旋流动中涡度最大值的增长行为，验证Childress在2008年提出的t^{4/3}增长上界猜想，该猜想得到了2016年数值计算的支持
AI.techniques: 利用动能和涉及涡度的守恒量来估计速度最大值，通过能量守恒和涡度相关守恒量建立控制关系
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于具有紧支集初始涡度的无旋轴对称流动，涡度最大值的增长上界为t^{4/3}
AI.significance: 解决了轴对称流动理论中的一个重要猜想，为涡度增长行为提供了严格数学证明，对流体力学中的奇点形成和长期行为研究有重要意义

title: Global Stabilization for the BBM-KP equations on R2
summary:
In this paper, we present results on the energy decay of the BBM-KP equations
(I and II) posed on $\R^2$ with localized damping. This model offers an
alternative to the KP equations, analogous to how the regularized long-wave
equation relates to the classical Korteweg-de Vries (KdV) equation. We show
that the energy associated with the Cauchy problem decays exponentially when a
localized dissipative mechanism is present in a subdomain. Finally, we validate
the theoretical results on the exponential stabilization of solutions to the
BBM-KP equations with damping through numerical experiments using a
spectral-finite difference scheme.

AI.tldr: 证明了带局部阻尼的BBM-KP方程在二维空间上的能量指数衰减
AI.motivation: 研究BBM-KP方程（作为KP方程的正则化版本）在局部阻尼作用下的能量衰减行为，类似于BBM方程与KdV方程的关系
AI.techniques: 使用谱有限差分格式进行数值实验验证，结合理论分析证明指数稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了带局部阻尼的BBM-KP方程（I和II型）在R²上的柯西问题能量指数衰减
AI.significance: 为KP类方程的正则化版本提供了稳定性理论，建立了局部阻尼下的指数衰减结果，对水波方程稳定性分析有重要意义

title: Chain-structure solutions to a Schr\"odinger-Poisson system in   $\mathbb{R}^3$
summary:
We prove the existence of ground states and high-energy solutions to the
following Schr\"odinger-Poisson system
  \begin{align*}
  \begin{cases}
  - \Delta u + a(x) u + u v = 0,\newline
  \Delta v = u^2,
  \end{cases}
  \quad \text{in } \mathbb{R}^3,
  \end{align*}
  where $a \in L^\infty(\mathbb{R}^3)$ is nonnegative and radially symmetric in
the first two variables. Differing from the standard approach, our framework
yields chain-structure solutions, i.e. solutions periodic in the third
variable. A central part of this work is the construction of the Green function
of a Poisson problem subject to periodic boundary conditions and we show that
its asymptotic profile is tightly related to both the two and three dimensional
Poisson problems in the entire space. If the potential $a$ is constant along
the third variable, we apply symmetry techniques to construct solutions that
have nonvanishing derivative in the third variable.

AI.tldr: 证明了Schrödinger-Poisson系统在径向对称势下存在基态解和高能解，特别构造了在第三变量上具有周期性的链状结构解
AI.motivation: 研究三维Schrödinger-Poisson系统解的存在性问题，特别关注势函数a(x)在前两个变量径向对称的情况，旨在构造不同于传统方法的链状结构解（在第三变量上具有周期性）
AI.techniques: 构造周期边界条件下Poisson问题的Green函数，分析其渐近行为与二维、三维全空间Poisson问题的联系，应用对称性技术构造在第三变量上具有非零导数的解
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Schrödinger-Poisson系统基态解和高能解的存在性，构造了在第三变量上具有周期性的链状结构解，建立了周期边界条件下Poisson问题Green函数的渐近性质
AI.significance: 为Schrödinger-Poisson系统提供了新的解结构，扩展了该类系统解的存在性理论，发展的周期边界Green函数构造方法对相关偏微分方程研究有重要参考价值

title: Elliptic systems in Orlicz-Sobolev spaces with critical sources in   bounded domains
summary:
In this paper, we show the existence of non-trivial solutions to very general
elliptic systems with critical non-linearities in the sense of embeddings in
Orlicz-Sobolev spaces. This allows to consider non-linearities which do not
have polynomial growth. To achieve the existence, we combine a Mountain Pass
Theorem without the Palais-Smale condition with the second Concentration
Compactness Principle of Lions in Orlicz-Sobolev spaces.

AI.tldr: 证明了Orlicz-Sobolev空间中具有临界非线性的一般椭圆系统非平凡解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究Orlicz-Sobolev空间中具有临界非线性的椭圆系统，这类系统允许非线性项不具有多项式增长，扩展了传统Sobolev空间中的临界增长问题
AI.techniques: 结合无Palais-Smale条件的山路定理与Orlicz-Sobolev空间中的第二浓度紧性原理（Lions的浓度紧性原理）
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在Orlicz-Sobolev空间中具有临界非线性的一般椭圆系统存在非平凡解
AI.significance: 将临界非线性椭圆系统的存在性理论推广到Orlicz-Sobolev框架，允许处理非多项式增长的非线性项，扩展了变分方法的应用范围

title: The Field Equations of Penalized non-Parametric Regression
summary:
We view penalized risks through the lens of the calculus of variations. We
consider risks comprised of a fitness-term (e.g. MSE) and a gradient-based
penalty. After establishing the Euler-Lagrange field equations as a systematic
approach to finding minimizers of risks involving only first derivatives, we
proceed to exemplify this approach to the MSE penalized by the integral over
the squared l2-norm of the gradient of the regression function. The minimizer
of this risk is given as the solution to a second order inhomogeneous PDE,
where the inhomogeneity is given as the conditional expectation of the target
variable conditioned on the features. We discuss properties of the field
equations and practical implications thereof, which also apply to the classical
Ridge penalty for linear models, and embed our findings into the existing
literature. In particular, we find that we can recover the Rudin-Osher-Fatemi
model for image-denoising, if we consider the features as deterministic and
evenly distributed. Last, we outline several directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 将惩罚风险视为变分问题，建立欧拉-拉格朗日场方程作为寻找含梯度惩罚项风险最小化器的系统方法
AI.motivation: 研究包含适应度项（如均方误差）和基于梯度惩罚项的风险函数，通过变分法视角分析这类惩罚风险的最小化问题
AI.techniques: 变分法、欧拉-拉格朗日方程、偏微分方程理论、梯度惩罚正则化、图像去噪的Rudin-Osher-Fatemi模型
AI.main_theorems: 建立了包含一阶导数的风险最小化问题的欧拉-拉格朗日场方程系统方法；证明了梯度l2范数平方积分惩罚的MSE风险最小化器满足二阶非齐次PDE，其非齐次项为目标变量在特征条件下的条件期望
AI.significance: 为梯度惩罚正则化提供了严格的变分法理论基础，统一了经典岭惩罚和图像去噪模型，建立了统计学习与PDE理论的联系

title: Blowup for the forced electron MHD
summary:
The electron magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) contains a highly nonlinear Hall term
with an interesting structure. Exploring the Hall nonlinear structure, we
investigate possible phenomena of finite time blow up for the electron MHD with
a (non-rough) forcing. When the magnetic field has zero horizontal components,
the vertical component equation has a mixing feature with the mixer being the
current flow. By constructing a magnetic field profile whose current density is
approximately a hyperbolic flow near the origin, we show blowup develops in
finite time. In another setting when the magnetic field is a shear type, the
Hall term vanishes, and finite time blowup can be obtained for the forced
electron MHD as well.

AI.tldr: 证明了带强迫项的电子磁流体动力学方程在特定磁场配置下存在有限时间爆破现象
AI.motivation: 研究电子磁流体动力学(MHD)中高度非线性的霍尔项结构，探索在非粗糙强迫项作用下可能出现的有限时间爆破现象
AI.techniques: 利用霍尔项的特殊结构，构造特定磁场剖面（电流密度近似双曲流），分析剪切型磁场下霍尔项消失的特性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当磁场水平分量为零时，垂直分量方程具有混合特征，通过构造电流密度近似双曲流的磁场剖面，证明了有限时间爆破；2. 当磁场为剪切型时，霍尔项消失，同样证明了强迫电子MHD存在有限时间爆破
AI.significance: 揭示了电子MHD中非线性霍尔项可能导致奇异性的机制，为理解等离子体物理中的磁场演化奇异性提供了理论依据

title: Global well-posedness and optimal time-decay of 3D full compressible   Navier-Stokes system
summary:
In this paper, we investigate the global well-posedness and optimal
time-decay of classical solutions for the 3-D full compressible Navier-Stokes
system, which is given by the motion of the compressible viscous and
heat-conductive gases. First of all, we study the global well-posedness of the
Cauchy problem to the system when the initial data is small enough. Secondly,
we show the optimal decay rates of the higher-order spatial derivatives of the
$\dot{H}^{-s}$ $\left(0\leq s<\frac{3}{2}\right)$ negative Sobolev norms.
Finally, under the assumption that the initial data is bounded in $L^{1}$-norm,
we establish the upper and lower bounds of the optimal decay rates for the
classical solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究了三维完全可压缩Navier-Stokes系统经典解的整体适定性和最优时间衰减
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩粘性热传导气体运动的3D完全可压缩Navier-Stokes系统，关注小初值下经典解的整体存在性及其时间衰减行为
AI.techniques: 使用负Sobolev空间方法（$\dot{H}^{-s}$范数，$0\leq s<\frac{3}{2}$），结合能量估计和衰减分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 小初值下整体适定性；2. 高阶空间导数在负Sobolev范数下的最优衰减率；3. 初值有$L^1$界时经典解衰减率的上界和下界估计
AI.significance: 为完全可压缩Navier-Stokes系统提供了完整的衰减理论框架，建立了负Sobolev空间中的最优衰减估计，深化了对可压缩流体长时间行为理解

title: On the first width of hyperbolic surfaces: multiplicity and lower bounds
summary:
On a closed Riemannian surface of negative curvature, we prove a
characterization for configurations of closed geodesics arising from one
parameter Allen-Cahn min-max constructions. One of the facts we conclude is
that every geodesic occurs with multiplicity one. As an application we obtain a
uniform sharp lower bound for the first min-max width of closed hyperbolic
surfaces and prove it is only attained asymptotically. Moreover, we compute the
first width of the Bolza surface and of some hyperbolic surfaces with small
systoles.

AI.tldr: 在负曲率闭黎曼曲面上，证明了Allen-Cahn单参数极小极大构造产生的闭测地线配置的特征，并得到闭双曲曲面第一极小极大宽度的统一尖锐下界。
AI.motivation: 研究负曲率闭黎曼曲面上Allen-Cahn极小极大构造产生的闭测地线配置特征，旨在理解几何变分问题中极小极大解的结构性质，特别是测地线的重数问题。
AI.techniques: Allen-Cahn极小极大方法、几何测度论、双曲几何、变分分析、测地线理论，以及渐近分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明了Allen-Cahn单参数极小极大构造产生的每个测地线重数均为1；2) 得到了闭双曲曲面第一极小极大宽度的统一尖锐下界；3) 计算了Bolza曲面和一些小systole双曲曲面的第一宽度。
AI.significance: 为理解负曲率曲面上极小极大构造的几何结构提供了新视角，建立了测地线重数的重要性质，给出了双曲曲面宽度的精确估计，对几何变分理论和双曲几何有重要意义。

title: Some Remarks on the Riesz and reverse Riesz transforms on Broken Line
summary:
In this note, we study both the Riesz and reverse Riesz transforms on broken
line. This model can be described by $(-\infty, -1] \cup [1,\infty)$ equipped
with the measure $d\mu = |r|^{d_{1}-1}dr$ for $r \le -1$ and $d\mu =
r^{d_{2}-1}dr$ for $r\ge 1$, where $d_{1}, d_{2} >1$. For the Riesz transform,
we show that the range of its $L^{p}$ boundedness depends solely on the smaller
dimension, $d_{1} \wedge d_{2}$. Furthermore, we establish a Lorentz type
estimate at the endpoint. In our subsequent investigation, we consider the
reverse Riesz inequality by rigorously verifying the $L^{p}$ lower bounds for
the Riesz transform for almost every $p\in (1,\infty)$. Notably, unlike most
previous studies, we do not assume the doubling condition or the Poincar\'e
inequality. Our approach is based on careful estimates of the Riesz kernel and
a method known as harmonic annihilation.

AI.tldr: 证明了在断裂线上Riesz变换的L^p有界性范围仅取决于较小维度，并建立了端点Lorentz估计和反向Riesz不等式。
AI.motivation: 研究断裂线（由两个半直线组成，具有不同维度参数）上的Riesz变换和反向Riesz变换，不依赖传统的加倍条件或Poincaré不等式，探索非标准几何结构下的调和分析性质。
AI.techniques: Riesz核的精细估计、调和湮灭方法、Lorentz空间估计、端点分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. Riesz变换的L^p有界性范围仅由较小维度d₁∧d₂决定；2. 端点处的Lorentz型估计；3. 对几乎所有p∈(1,∞)验证了反向Riesz不等式的L^p下界。
AI.significance: 突破了传统加倍条件和Poincaré不等式的限制，为断裂几何结构上的调和分析提供了新结果，对奇异积分算子在非标准度量空间的研究有重要理论意义。

title: Three dimensional spherical transonic shock in a hemispherical shell
comment:
55 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with
  arXiv:2304.02429; text overlap with arXiv:2404.14652 by other authors
summary:
The existence and stability of a spherical transonic shock in a hemispherical
shell under the three dimensional perturbations of the incoming flows and the
exit pressure is established without any further restrictions on the background
transonic shock solutions. The perturbed transonic shock are completely free
and its strength and position are uniquely determined by the incoming flows and
the exit pressure. A key issue in the analysis is the ``spherical projection
coordinates" (i.e. the composition of the spherical coordinates and the
stereographic projection), which provides an appropriate setting for the
spherical transonic shock problem in the sense that the transformed equations
have a similar structure as the steady Euler equations and do not contain any
coordinates singularities. Then we decompose the hyperbolic and elliptic modes
in the steady Euler equations in terms of the deformation and vorticity. An
elaborate reformulation of the Rankine-Hugoniot conditions yields an unusual
second order differential boundary condition on the shock front to the first
order nonlocal deformation-curl system, from which an oblique boundary
condition can be derived after homogenizing the curl system and introducing the
potential function. The analysis of the compatibility conditions at the
intersection of the shock front and the shell boundary is crucial for the
optimal regularity of all physical quantities.

AI.tldr: 建立了半球壳中球形跨音速激波在三维扰动下的存在性和稳定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究三维扰动下球形跨音速激波的稳定性问题，特别是当来流和出口压力受到扰动时，激波位置和强度的变化规律，这是跨音速流动理论中的重要基础问题。
AI.techniques: 引入"球形投影坐标"消除坐标奇异性；通过变形和涡量分解双曲-椭圆模式；将Rankine-Hugoniot条件重构为二阶微分边界条件；处理激波前沿与边界交点的相容性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在三维扰动下，球形跨音速激波的存在性和稳定性，且激波位置和强度由来流和出口压力唯一确定，无需对背景解施加额外限制。
AI.significance: 为球形跨音速激波的稳定性理论提供了严格数学基础，发展了处理复杂几何中激波问题的新方法，对空气动力学和流体力学中的跨音速流动研究具有重要意义。

title: Perturbed Fourier Transform Associated with Schr\"odinger Operators
summary:
We give an exposition on the $L^2$ theory of the perturbed Fourier transform
associated with a Schr\"odinger operator $H=-d^2/dx^2 +V$ on the real line,
where $V$ is a real-valued \mbox{finite} measure. In the case $V\in L^1\cap
L^2$, we explicitly define the perturbed Fourier transform $\mathcal{F}$ for
$H$ and obtain an eigenfunction expansion theorem for square integrable
functions. This provides a complete proof of the inversion formula for $\cF$
that covers the class of short range potentials in $(1+|x|)^{-\frac12-\eps} L^2
$. Such paradigm has applications in the study of scattering problems in
connection with the spectral properties and asymptotic completeness of the wave
operators.

AI.tldr: 建立了有限测度势能薛定谔算子的扰动傅里叶变换L²理论，并证明了平方可积函数的特征函数展开定理
AI.motivation: 研究实线上具有有限测度势能的薛定谔算子H=-d²/dx²+V的扰动傅里叶变换理论，解决散射问题中谱性质和波算子渐近完备性相关的数学问题
AI.techniques: 使用L²理论框架，对V∈L¹∩L²情况显式定义扰动傅里叶变换，建立特征函数展开，证明覆盖(1+|x|)^{-1/2-ε}L²类短程势的反演公式
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对V∈L¹∩L²显式定义扰动傅里叶变换ℱ；2) 平方可积函数的特征函数展开定理；3) 覆盖短程势类(1+|x|)^{-1/2-ε}L²的ℱ反演公式
AI.significance: 为散射问题提供了完整的数学基础，连接了谱性质和波算子渐近完备性，扩展了短程势能薛定谔算子的傅里叶分析理论

title: Inverse Problems for Mean Field Games
summary:
In this book, we present a curated collection of existing results on inverse
problems for Mean Field Games (MFGs), a cutting-edge and rapidly evolving field
of research. Our aim is to provide fresh insights, novel perspectives, and a
comprehensive foundation for future investigations into this fascinating area.
MFGs, a class of differential games involving a continuum of non-atomic
players, offer a powerful framework for analyzing the collective behavior of
large populations of symmetric agents as the number of agents approaches
infinity. This framework has proven to be an invaluable tool for quantitatively
modeling the macroscopic dynamics of agents striving to minimize specific costs
in complex systems, such as crowd dynamics, financial markets, traffic flows,
and social networks.
  The study of MFGs has traditionally focused on forward problems, where the
goal is to determine the equilibrium behavior of agents given a set of model
parameters, such as cost functions, interaction mechanisms, and initial
conditions. However, the inverse problems for MFGs -- which seek to infer these
underlying parameters from observed data -- have received comparatively less
attention in the literature. This book seeks to address this gap by delving
into the fundamental aspects of MFG inverse problems, with a particular
emphasis on issues of unique identifiability, stability, and reconstruction of
unknown parameters. These problems are not only mathematically challenging but
also of immense practical significance, as they enable the calibration and
validation of MFG models using real-world data.
  This book is intended to serve as a valuable resource for researchers
interested in the theory and applications of MFGs, particularly in inverse
problems. Through this book, we hope to inspire further exploration and
innovation in this dynamic and interdisciplinary area of study.

AI.tldr: 本书系统梳理了平均场博弈逆问题的现有成果，填补了该领域研究空白
AI.motivation: 平均场博弈（MFGs）作为分析大规模对称智能体集体行为的强大框架，在正向问题研究已较成熟，但逆问题（从观测数据推断模型参数）相对缺乏系统研究。本书旨在填补这一空白，为MFG模型的校准和验证提供理论基础。
AI.techniques: 本书采用综述性方法，系统梳理现有MFG逆问题研究成果，重点关注参数识别、稳定性和重构等核心数学问题。
AI.main_theorems: 本书作为综述性专著，主要贡献在于：1）系统整理MFG逆问题现有理论成果；2）建立参数可识别性、稳定性和重构的数学框架；3）为未来研究提供全面基础。
AI.significance: 本书填补了平均场博弈逆问题研究的系统性空白，为MFG模型的实际应用（如人群动力学、金融市场、交通流等）提供了关键的数学工具，推动了这一跨学科领域的发展。

title: Instability of the peaked traveling wave in a local model for shallow   water waves
summary:
The traveling wave with the peaked profile arises in the limit of the family
of traveling waves with the smooth profiles. We study the linear and nonlinear
stability of the peaked traveling wave by using a local model for shallow water
waves, which is related to the Hunter--Saxton equation. The evolution problem
is well-defined in the function space $H^1_{\rm per} \cap W^{1,\infty}$, where
we derive the linearized equations of motion and study the nonlinear evolution
of co-periodic perturbations to the peaked periodic wave by using methods of
characteristics. Within the linearized equations, we prove the spectral
instability of the peaked traveling wave from the spectrum of the linearized
operator in a Hilbert space, which completely covers the closed vertical strip
with a specific half-width. Within the nonlinear equations, we prove the
nonlinear instability of the peaked traveling wave by showing that the gradient
of perturbations grow at the wave peak. By using numerical approximations of
the smooth traveling waves and the spectrum of their associated linearized
operator, we show that the spectral instability of the peaked traveling wave
cannot be obtained in the limit along the family of the spectrally stable
smooth traveling waves.

AI.tldr: 证明了浅水波局部模型中尖峰行波的线性和非线性不稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究浅水波模型中尖峰行波的稳定性问题，该尖峰行波是光滑行波族的极限情况，与Hunter-Saxton方程相关
AI.techniques: 特征线方法、线性化算子谱分析、Hilbert空间中的谱理论、数值逼近光滑行波及其线性化算子谱
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在函数空间H^1_per ∩ W^{1,∞}中建立演化问题的适定性；2. 证明尖峰行波的谱不稳定性，线性化算子的谱覆盖特定半宽度的垂直带；3. 证明非线性不稳定性，扰动梯度在波峰处增长；4. 证明尖峰行波的谱不稳定性不能通过谱稳定的光滑行波族的极限获得
AI.significance: 揭示了尖峰行波的不稳定性机制，为浅水波模型的稳定性理论提供了重要结果，对理解非线性波方程的奇异极限行为有理论意义

title: Kink breathers on a traveling wave background in the defocusing modified   Korteweg--de Vries equation
summary:
We characterize a general traveling periodic wave of the defocusing mKdV
(modified Korteweg--de Vries) equation by using a quotient of products of
Jacobi's elliptic theta functions. Compared to the standing periodic wave of
the defocusing NLS (nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger) equation, these solutions are
special cases of Riemann's theta function of genus two. Based on our
characterization, we derive a new two-parameter solution form which defines a
general three-parameter solution form with the scaling transformation.
Eigenfunctions of the Lax system for the general traveling periodic wave are
also characterized as quotients of products of Jacobi's theta functions. As the
main outcome of our analytical computations, we derive a new solution of the
defocusing mKdV equation which describes the kink breather propagating on a
general traveling wave background.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过雅可比椭圆θ函数刻画了散焦mKdV方程的一般行波周期解，并推导出描述在一般行波背景上传播的扭结呼吸子新解。
AI.motivation: 研究散焦mKdV方程的一般行波周期解，相比散焦NLS方程的驻波周期解，这些解是黎曼二阶θ函数的特例，旨在完全刻画这类解并推导新解形式。
AI.techniques: 使用雅可比椭圆θ函数、黎曼θ函数理论、Lax系统的特征函数分析、尺度变换以及椭圆函数理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 用雅可比椭圆θ函数的商乘积刻画散焦mKdV一般行波周期解；2. 推导出新的二参数解形式，通过尺度变换得到三参数解；3. 刻画Lax系统特征函数的雅可比θ函数表示；4. 推导出描述在一般行波背景上传播的扭结呼吸子新解。
AI.significance: 提供了散焦mKdV方程周期波的完整解析描述，建立了与椭圆函数理论的联系，推导的新解形式扩展了可积系统的解空间，对非线性波理论和可积系统研究有重要理论意义。

title: Quasiparticle solutions to the 1D nonlocal Fisher--KPP equation with a   fractal time derivative in the weak diffusion approximation
summary:
In this paper, we propose an approach for constructing quasiparticle-like
asymptotic solutions within the weak diffusion approximation for the
generalized population Fisher--Kolmogorov--Petrovskii--Piskunov (Fisher--KPP)
equation, which incorporates nonlocal quadratic competitive losses and a
fractal time derivative of non-integer order $\alpha$, where $0<\alpha\leq 1$.
This approach is based on the semiclassical approximation and the principles of
the Maslov method. The fractal time derivative is introduced in the framework
of $F^{\alpha}$-calculus. The Fisher--KPP equation is decomposed into a system
of nonlinear equations that describe the dynamics of interacting quasiparticles
within classes of trajectory-concentrated functions. A key element in
constructing approximate quasiparticle solutions is the interplay between the
dynamical system of quasiparticle moments and an auxiliary linear system of
equations, which is coupled with the nonlinear system. General constructions
are illustrated through examples that examine the effect of the fractal
parameter $\alpha$ on quasiparticle behavior.

AI.tldr: 提出了在弱扩散近似下构造分数阶Fisher-KPP方程类准粒子渐近解的方法
AI.motivation: 研究包含非局部二次竞争损失和分数阶时间导数（0<α≤1）的广义Fisher-KPP方程，该方程在种群动力学、反应扩散系统等领域有重要应用，需要发展有效的渐近分析方法
AI.techniques: 半经典近似、Maslov方法、F^α-微积分、轨迹集中函数类、准粒子矩动力学系统与辅助线性系统的耦合分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了构造分数阶Fisher-KPP方程准粒子渐近解的框架，将原方程分解为描述准粒子相互作用的非线性方程组，并通过准粒子矩动力学系统与辅助线性系统的耦合来构造近似解
AI.significance: 为分数阶反应扩散方程提供了新的渐近分析方法，揭示了分数阶参数α对准粒子动力学行为的影响，对理解复杂系统中的非局部和非马尔可夫过程有理论意义

title: Energy concentration in a two-dimensional magnetic skyrmion model:   variational analysis of lattice and continuum theories
summary:
We investigate the formation of singularities in a baby Skyrme type energy
model, which describes magnetic solitons in two-dimensional ferromagnetic
systems. In presence of a diverging anisotropy term, which enforces a preferred
background state of the magnetization, we establish a weak compactness of its
topological charge density, which converges to an atomic measure with quantized
weights. We characterize the $\Gamma$-limit of the energies as the total
variation of this measure. In the case of lattice type energies, we first need
to carefully define a notion of discrete topological charge for
$\mathbb{S}^2$-valued maps. We then prove a corresponding compactness and
$\Gamma$-convergence result, thereby bridging the discrete and continuum
theories.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了二维铁磁系统中具有发散各向异性项的baby Skyrme能量模型的奇点形成，建立了拓扑电荷密度的弱紧致性和Γ收敛性。
AI.motivation: 研究二维铁磁系统中磁孤子的奇点形成问题，特别关注存在发散各向异性项的情况，该各向异性项强制磁化强度趋向于特定的背景态。
AI.techniques: 使用弱紧致性分析、Γ收敛理论、拓扑电荷密度分析、原子测度理论，以及离散与连续理论之间的桥梁构建方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 拓扑电荷密度的弱紧致性收敛到具有量子化权重的原子测度；2. 能量的Γ极限是该测度的全变差；3. 对于晶格型能量，建立了离散拓扑电荷的紧致性和Γ收敛结果。
AI.significance: 为二维铁磁系统中磁孤子的奇点形成提供了严格的数学框架，建立了离散与连续理论之间的桥梁，对理解拓扑缺陷的量子化和能量极限行为有重要理论意义。

title: On a few counterexamples to solvability of the $div$ equation in domains   with external cusps
summary:
This paper examines the solvability of the equation $\mathrm{div} \
\mathbf{u} = f$ with a zero Dirichlet boundary condition for $\mathbf{u}$. A
classical result establishes that for a bounded domain $\Omega \subset
\mathbb{R}^N$ with a Lipschitz boundary and for $f \in L^p(\Omega)$ with zero
mean value there exists a solution $\mathbf{u} \in (W_0^{1, p}(\Omega))^N$ for
$1 < p < \infty$ with the $W^{1,p}$ norm controlled by the $L^p$ norm of the
right-hand side $f$. The results were extended to John domains and excluded the
existence of the solution operator in domains with external cusps. Our aim is
to specify at least some classes of the right-hand sides for which the problem
cannot have a solution in the space $W^{1,p}_0(\Omega)$. We first extend the
counterexample by Luc Tartar originally formulated for right-hand side
functions in $\overline{L^2}$ in two space dimensions to a more general class
of functions in $\overline{L^p}$ spaces and a more general type of singular
domains. We then generalize this result to an arbitrary dimension $N$.
Returning to two space dimensions, we investigate domains with boundary
properties superior to those of previously studied H\"older continuous domains
and construct counterexamples also in this situation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了散度方程在奇异区域中的不可解性，扩展了Tartar的反例到更高维和更一般的函数空间
AI.motivation: 研究散度方程在奇异区域中的可解性问题，经典结果在Lipschitz区域和John区域成立，但在外部尖点区域解算子不存在，本文旨在确定在哪些右端函数类中问题在W^{1,p}_0(Ω)空间中无解
AI.techniques: 扩展Tartar的反例构造方法，从二维推广到任意维，从L^2空间推广到L^p空间，研究更一般的奇异区域类型，包括边界性质优于Hölder连续的区域
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将Tartar的反例从二维推广到任意维N；2. 将反例从L^2空间推广到L^p空间；3. 在边界性质优于Hölder连续的区域中构造反例；4. 确定了在奇异区域中散度方程在W^{1,p}_0(Ω)空间中无解的右端函数类
AI.significance: 深化了对散度方程在奇异区域中可解性的理解，为流体力学和弹性理论中的相关PDE问题提供了重要的反例，揭示了奇异几何对解算子存在性的影响

title: The Cauchy problem for nonlinear dispersive models of long internal   waves in the presence of the Coriolis force
summary:
We investigate models of dispersive long internal waves with rotational
effects, specifically the Benjamin-Ono (BO) and intermediate long wave (ILW)
equations modified by the presence of the nonlocal operator $\partial_x^{-1}$,
which mathematically accounts for rotational influences. We establish a local
and global well-posedness theory while ensuring the unconditional uniqueness of
solutions in low-regularity Sobolev-type spaces. Our approach is based on
techniques introduced by Molinet and Vento in \cite{MR3397003}.

AI.tldr: 建立了带有旋转效应的Benjamin-Ono和中间长波方程在低正则性Sobolev空间中的局部和整体适定性理论，并证明了无条件唯一性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有旋转效应的色散长内波模型，特别是带有非局部算子∂_x^{-1}的Benjamin-Ono和中间长波方程，该算子数学上描述了旋转效应的影响。
AI.techniques: 基于Molinet和Vento在文献MR3397003中引入的技术，在低正则性Sobolev型空间中建立适定性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了带有旋转效应的BO和ILW方程在低正则性Sobolev空间中的局部和整体适定性，并证明了无条件唯一性。
AI.significance: 扩展了旋转效应对内波模型影响的理论理解，为研究地球物理流体动力学中的旋转效应提供了严格的数学基础。
